name: Luis M. Delgado
personality: Patient but no-nonsense, Luis knows the block like the back of his hand and values quiet honesty. He’s quick to share a joke with a local bakery owner but won’t hesitate to call out reckless behavior.
quirk: Carries a small, battered sketchbook where he doodles the fire escapes and graffiti he passes.
voice: He drops a casual "Yo, what’s good?" into almost every conversation.
daily: Patrols his beat from sunrise to sundown, stopping by the local bodega for coffee, checking on the waterfront warehouses, and ending his shift with a quick chat at the rooftop bar.
